div1.entryFree:
Neighbour, vb. 1) intr. to be near, to be in the vicinity: a copse that --s by, Ven. 259. Partic. --ing adjectively: all --ing languages, All's IV, 1, 18. tenants, friends and --ing gentlemen, H4A III, 1, 90. --ing ponds, Cymb. I, 4, 97. our --ing shore, Per. I, 4, 60. some --ing nation, Per. I, 4, 60
2) trans. to be near, to adjoin, to be at the side of: thy places shall still n. mine, Wint. I, 2, 449. wholesome berries ripen best --ed by fruit of baser quality, H5 I, 1, 62.
